rag_rules: Use `assume` and `guarantee` to encode requirement intent in AGREE contracts
Place component-level contracts in component type annexes; use implementation annexes for assignments
generic_rules: AGREE expressions must match declared types; avoid type mismatches in helper declarations
Do not assume AADL property names are automatically available as AGREE variables
Avoid unsafe Boolean comparisons over opaque data types in AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for helper declarations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE expressions unless model exposes typed ports or constants
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons in AGREE
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
